name: UBA : VPN Certificate Sharing
notes: This rule detects when a VPN event's Username is not equal to 'VPNSubjectcn'. This could indicate that there is VPN certificate sharing occurring. Certificate sharing or other authentication token sharing can make it difficult to identify who's done what. This can complicate taking next steps in the event of a compromise.
conditions_text: when an event matches all of the following UBA : BB : VPN Mapping (logic)
when any of VPN Subject CN (custom) are contained in any of UBA : VPN Subject_CN - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
when any of VPN Subject CN (custom) is the key and any of Username is the value in any of UBA : VPN Subject_CN and UserName - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : VPN Certificate Sharing on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches all of the following UBA : BB : VPN Mapping (logic)
AND when any of VPN Subject CN (custom) are contained in any of UBA : VPN Subject_CN - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
AND NOT when any of VPN Subject CN (custom) is the key and any of Username is the value in any of UBA : VPN Subject_CN and UserName - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: UBA : VPN Certificate Sharing
